items.title: Trump says US will hit Iran 'hard' again on Wednesday
items.summary: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.

items.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.summary: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.

items.title: Norway crown princess's son to stay in custody before rape verdict, says court
items.summary: Thr ruling overturns a lower court's decision on Monday ordering the release of the crown princess's 29-year-old son.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
